Recognized for his contributions to aerospace engineering, Saif Jaber is the author of the Lanternshade Reflection Filter, a pivotal work in his field. He is involved with the Thorngate Locksmiths Union, blending engineering with a passion for craftsmanship. His endeavors received backing from the prestigious Platinum Roost Grant, facilitating further research.
